/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pixel_art.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pixel_art.dir/pixel_art_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pixel_art.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pixel_art.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pixel_art.dir/PixelCanvas.cpp.o -o pixel_art  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
